title: aster inaequalis
intro: Aster inaequalis, also known as the western skyrocket, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the western United States and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for fever and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in herbal preparations to promote digestion, relieve pain, and reduce swelling, as well as to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Aster inaequalis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
